mapper.sql: id, parent_id, location_grade, location_type, location_level, location_level_count, internal_serial_no, internal_quantity, location_no, location_name, warehouse_code, parent_name, storage_mode, specification, is_use, location_sort_no, location_fullpath_name, capacity_total, capacity_used, is_deleted, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from inv_location where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select
from inv_location where parent_id = #{parentId} and is_deleted = 0 order by internal_serial_no asc, location_sort_no asc

select
from inv_location where parent_id is null and is_deleted = 0 order by location_sort_no asc

select
from inv_location where warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode} and is_deleted = 0 order by location_sort_no asc

WITH RECURSIVE location_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM inv_location WHERE id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT l.id FROM inv_location l INNER JOIN location_tree lt ON l.parent_id = lt.id WHERE l.is_deleted = 0 ) SELECT
FROM inv_location WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM location_tree) AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY location_sort_no ASC

WITH RECURSIVE location_tree AS ( SELECT id, location_level FROM inv_location WHERE id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT l.id, l.location_level FROM inv_location l INNER JOIN location_tree lt ON l.parent_id = lt.id WHERE l.is_deleted = 0 ) SELECT
FROM inv_location WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM location_tree) AND location_level <= #{maxLevel} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY location_sort_no ASC
mapper.insert:
insert into inv_location( parent_id, location_grade, location_type, location_level, location_level_count, internal_serial_no, internal_quantity, location_no, location_name, warehouse_code, parent_name, storage_mode, specification, is_use, location_sort_no, location_fullpath_name, capacity_total, capacity_used, is_deleted, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{parentId}, #{locationGrade}, #{locationType}, #{locationLevel}, #{locationLevelCount}, #{internalSerialNo}, #{internalQuantity}, #{locationNo}, #{locationName}, #{warehouseCode}, #{parentName}, #{storageMode}, #{specification},
#{isUse} 0 , #{locationSortNo}, #{locationFullpathName}, #{capacityTotal}, #{capacityUsed}, 0, #{remarks}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )

insert into inv_location( parent_id, location_grade, location_type, location_level, location_level_count, internal_serial_no, internal_quantity, location_no, location_name, warehouse_code, parent_name, storage_mode, specification, is_use, location_sort_no, location_fullpath_name, capacity_total, capacity_used, is_deleted, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values
( #{entity.parentId}, #{entity.locationGrade}, #{entity.locationType}, #{entity.locationLevel}, #{entity.locationLevelCount}, #{entity.internalSerialNo}, #{entity.internalQuantity}, #{entity.locationNo}, #{entity.locationName}, #{entity.warehouseCode}, #{entity.parentName}, #{entity.storageMode}, #{entity.specification},
#{entity.isUse} 0 , #{entity.locationSortNo}, #{entity.locationFullpathName}, #{entity.capacityTotal}, #{entity.capacityUsed}, 0, #{entity.remarks}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime} )

insert into inv_location( id, parent_id, location_grade, location_type, location_level, location_level_count, internal_serial_no, internal_quantity, location_no, location_name, warehouse_code, parent_name, storage_mode, specification, is_use, location_sort_no, location_fullpath_name, capacity_total, capacity_used, is_deleted, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values
( #{entity.id}, #{entity.parentId}, #{entity.locationGrade}, #{entity.locationType}, #{entity.locationLevel}, #{entity.locationLevelCount}, #{entity.internalSerialNo}, #{entity.internalQuantity}, #{entity.locationNo}, #{entity.locationName}, #{entity.warehouseCode}, #{entity.parentName}, #{entity.storageMode}, #{entity.specification},
#{entity.isUse} 0 , #{entity.locationSortNo}, #{entity.locationFullpathName}, #{entity.capacityTotal}, #{entity.capacityUsed}, 0, #{entity.remarks}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update parent_id = values(parent_id), location_grade = values(location_grade), location_type = values(location_type), location_level = values(location_level), location_level_count = values(location_level_count), internal_serial_no = values(internal_serial_no), internal_quantity = values(internal_quantity), location_no = values(location_no), location_name = values(location_name), warehouse_code = values(warehouse_code), parent_name = values(parent_name), storage_mode = values(storage_mode), specification = values(specification), is_use = values(is_use), location_sort_no = values(location_sort_no), location_fullpath_name = values(location_fullpath_name), capacity_total = values(capacity_total), capacity_used = values(capacity_used), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update inv_location
parent_id = #{parentId},
location_grade = #{locationGrade},
location_type = #{locationType},
location_level = #{locationLevel},
location_level_count = #{locationLevelCount},
internal_serial_no = #{internalSerialNo},
internal_quantity = #{internalQuantity},
location_no = #{locationNo},
location_name = #{locationName},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode},
parent_name = #{parentName},
storage_mode = #{storageMode},
specification = #{specification},
is_use = #{isUse},
location_sort_no = #{locationSortNo},
location_fullpath_name = #{locationFullpathName},
capacity_total = #{capacityTotal},
capacity_used = #{capacityUsed},
remarks = #{remarks},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
update inv_location set is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now(), remarks = concat(ifnull(remarks, ''), ' | ', #{username}, '删除', now()) where id = #{id}

update inv_location set is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now(), remarks = concat(ifnull(remarks, ''), ' | ', #{username}, '删除', now()) where id in
#{id}

WITH RECURSIVE location_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM inv_location WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT l.id FROM inv_location l INNER JOIN location_tree lt ON l.parent_id = lt.id WHERE l.is_deleted = 0 ) UPDATE inv_location SET is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now(), remarks = concat(ifnull(remarks, ''), ' | ', #{username}, '删除', now()) WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM location_tree)
mapper.select:
select
from inv_location where is_deleted = 0 order by location_sort_no asc
mapper.update: update inv_location set is_use = #{isUse}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select
from inv_location where id in
#{id}
and is_deleted = 0 order by location_sort_no asc
mapper.update: UPDATE inv_location SET internal_quantity = internal_quantity + #{delta}, update_time = now() WHERE id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from inv_location where location_sort_no like concat(#{locationSortNoPrefix}, '%') and is_use = 1 and is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from inv_location where parent_id = #{parentId} and is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from inv_location where parent_id = #{parentId} and is_use = 1 and is_deleted = 0
